title: Google-Cloud-Associate Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level Google-Cloud-Associate certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
Describe time you designed high-availability architecture
